System Overview

Complete architectural specification of the ShoppDropp platform

Core Module
System Definition
ShoppDropp is an autonomous eCommerce operating system that connects product sourcing (AutoDS), store operations (Shopify), and marketing execution (Meta Ads) into a single AI-driven closed-loop growth engine.

Primary Function

Autonomously build, manage, and optimize Shopify dropshipping stores using AI-driven workflows.

Target Users

eCommerce entrepreneurs, dropshippers, marketing agencies, and enterprise clients.

Core Architecture Rules
1

OpenClaw = planning engine ONLY

AI generates execution plans, never calls APIs directly

2

Worker = executes ALL API calls

All external integrations happen through Worker

3

Orchestrator = infrastructure ONLY

VPS, Docker, lifecycle management

4

Dashboard = visualization ONLY

UI layer, no business logic

5

Supabase = system of record

All state persisted in PostgreSQL

6

Redis = job queue

BullMQ for job orchestration

Dashboard
Next.js 15 + React

User Interface Layer

Authentication
Project Management
Billing
Monitoring
Real-time Updates
API
NestJS + TypeScript

Business Logic Layer

REST Endpoints
JWT Auth
Stripe Integration
Job Orchestration
Webhooks
Database
Supabase + PostgreSQL

Data Persistence Layer

Auth
Storage
Realtime
Row Level Security
Encrypted Secrets
Queue
Redis + BullMQ

Job Orchestration Layer

Job Scheduling
Retry Logic
Priority Queues
Job State Tracking
Dead Letter Queue
Orchestrator
Docker + Node.js

Infrastructure Layer

VPS Provisioning
Docker Management
Worker Deployment
Health Monitoring
Auto-recovery
Worker
Docker + TypeScript

Execution Layer

Job Execution
API Integration
AI Planning
State Machine
Heartbeat Reporting
Unified System Loop
RESEARCH
STORE BUILD
PRODUCT SOURCING
LISTING OPTIMIZATION
META ADS
MONITORING
OPTIMIZATION

Continuous autonomous optimization loop connecting all subsystems
